overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a scenic spring landscape with cherry blossoms, a river, and a snow-capped mountain in the background. The character moves from the water's edge up a grassy hillside into a dense flowering grove.

events.description: wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance across the river
character moves from rocky shoreline onto grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the riverbank toward the snow-capped mountain, straw hat and fur cloak swaying gently

entered.detail: large snow-covered peak dominating the background, resembling Mount Fuji
calm waterway running parallel to the path on the left side
numerous trees with white blossoms lining both sides of the path
lush green slope rising from the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a serene riverside path with a majestic snow-capped mountain ahead. White cherry blossoms frame the view while a wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered flowering trees

events.description: character begins ascending the grassy slope away from the water
trees become denser as character moves deeper into the grove

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the grassy meadow, moving away from the river toward the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grassy hillside away from the river, with the water disappearing from view behind. The flowering trees grow denser as the path climbs, partially obscuring the mountain view while the terrain becomes more enclosed by vegetation.

events.description: entering dense tree cover with blossoms forming a canopy overhead
large tree trunk passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense cherry blossom grove, surrounded by white flowers on all sides

entered.detail: dark stone structure or wall visible in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dense grove of flowering cherry trees, with white blossoms creating a canopy overhead. The mountain is now mostly hidden behind the thick vegetation, and a distant stone structure becomes visible on the right as the path winds through the tranquil forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open riverside vista into the intimate enclosure of a flowering grove. It begins with a samurai walking along a serene path beside calm water, framed by white cherry blossoms with a majestic snow-capped mountain looming ahead and a wooden bridge in the distance. As the character ascends a grassy hillside, the river disappears from view and the terrain becomes increasingly enclosed by vegetation, causing the mountain to be partially obscured. The scene then shifts into a dense grove where the flowering trees form a thick canopy overhead, almost entirely hiding the mountain. Finally, the path winds deeper into the tranquil forest, revealing a distant stone structure on the right.
